title: As Long As You Love Me
why_this_song: Repetitive chorus with second-conditional modals (don't care who you are, where you're from). Perfect for A2 learners practicing conditional commitment and 'as long as' clauses.

vocab_hooks.note: conditional conjunction — the hook of the whole song
often with 'about' — 'I don't care about it'

lines: As long as you love me
Who you are, where you're from
As long as you love me
What you did, as long as you love me (I know)

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:
exercises.excerpt_after: has always been a friend of mine

exercises.excerpt: I'm leaving my life in your hand
exercises.teacher_note: Auto-generated from synced lyrics — add the model translation when reviewing.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "As Long As You Love Me" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "As Long As You Love Me" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.excerpt_after: has always been a friend of mine

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "care" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "care" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm leaving my life in your hand
Feels like it's deep within me (oooh, ooh-ooh)
When you look into my eyes

teaching_notes_md:
**Why this song works for A2 Brazilian learners:**

1. Slow, clear enunciation — boy-band pop is famously clean vocally.
2. 'As long as' is a high-value structure that doesn't exist as a single word in Portuguese.
3. The song repeats the same chorus structure ~6x, so learners internalize the pattern by the end.

**Classroom flow (20 min):**

- 3 min: Play the chorus twice. Students raise a hand every time they hear 'as long as'.
- 5 min: Do the listen_and_fill exercise in pairs.
- 5 min: Translate line exercise — compare answers around the room.
- 7 min: Discussion prompt in pt-BR first, then have students retry in EN.

**Do NOT** print or project the full lyrics. Send students to the Letras.mus.br link on their own devices if they want the whole text.
